title: rebutia oculata subsp. tilcarensis
intro: Rebutia oculata subsp. tilcarensis is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Rebutia oculata cactus, native to Bolivia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rebutia oculata subsp. tilcarensis include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its therapeutic properties.
